ogTitle: Blair Athol vs Blakiston: Climate Safety

heading: Blair Athol vs Blakiston — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Blair Athol, South Australia and Blakiston, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Blakiston has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Blair Athol (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Blair Athol or Blakiston safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Blair Athol has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Blakiston scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Blair Athol scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Blakiston scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Blair Athol or Blakiston?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Blakiston has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
